name: X: Reply In DM Thread
description: Open one X DM thread URL in a fresh tab, draft a reply, pause for human approval, then send. Use when replying inside an existing thread. Do not use to start a brand-new conversation by handle (use `x_send_dm`).

browser_automation.description: Navigates a fresh tab to the thread URL, handles the X Chat passcode gate if shown, activates the composer with a trusted click, types the reply, asserts send is enabled, and pauses at the review gate before sending.

sequences.name: x_reply_dm_thread
sequences.description: Open DM thread -> (onboarding gate) -> activate composer -> type message -> verify send enabled -> pause for review -> send.

steps.name: Open the DM thread in a fresh tab
Allow the thread page to settle
Wait for the DM composer or X Chat onboarding gate
Pause if X Chat requires passcode setup
steps.message: If X Chat asks you to create a passcode, finish that setup now. Otherwise click Continue immediately.
steps.instructions: After the passcode gate is cleared, the workflow will wait for the DM composer and continue typing.

steps.name: Wait for the DM composer after onboarding is cleared
Activate the DM composer with a trusted click
Allow the DM caret to settle
Confirm the DM send control is enabled
Pause for review before sending the DM reply
steps.message: DM reply draft is ready. Click Continue only if you want to send it.
steps.instructions: If you do not want to send this DM reply, stop the workflow instead of waiting for the timeout.

steps.name: Allow the DM send to settle
Read the final DM thread state
steps.script: const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const composer = document.querySelector("div[data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true']"); return { url: location.href, composer_text: composer ? normalize(composer.textContent || '') : null, send_button_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='dmComposerSendButton'], div[role='button'][data-testid='dmComposerSendButton'], button[aria-label*='Send' i]"), pin_onboarding_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now']") };

help.summary: Reply inside one existing X DM thread after human approval.

examples.command: rzn-browser run x reply-dm-thread --param thread_url="https://x.com/messages/123-456" --param message_text="Today's a great day"
examples.description: Reply inside an existing DM thread after confirming at the review gate.

notes: Opens a fresh tab so multiple thread replies can be orchestrated in parallel.
